title: T-025 — quality_inspections + quality_test_results schema + RLS (09-c-01)
prompt:
# T-025 — quality_inspections + quality_test_results schema

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §6.3 quality_inspections, §6.3 quality_test_results, §9.1 RLS, §11.2 V-QA-INSP
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create quality_inspections (unified inspection table with inspection_seq, inspection_number GENERATED, all CHECK constraints, retention_until GENERATED, idx_insp_pending partial index) and quality_test_results child table per §6.3.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0120_quality_inspections.sql` per §6.3 verbatim DDL: quality_inspection_seq SEQUENCE; quality_inspections columns including inspection_type CHECK enum, reference_type CHECK enum, status CHECK enum, result CHECK enum, samples_taken/accept/reject, signature_hash, fail_reason_code_id, retention_until GENERATED 7y; idx_insp_pending and idx_insp_ref indexes.
2. quality_test_results child table with parameter_id FK, measured_value, measured_text, result CHECK enum, external_lims_id stub, evidence_refs JSONB, idx_results_inspection.
3. RLS tenant_isolation on both.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0120_quality_inspections.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/qualityInspections.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/qualityTestResults.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/quality-inspections-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0120 applied, when \d quality_inspections runs, then all §6.3 columns exist with inspection_type CHECK enum (5 values), result CHECK enum (4 values), retention_until GENERATED 7y, RLS enabled
2. Given two inspections inserted, when SELECT inspection_number runs, then both have format 'INS-' + 8-digit zero-padded sequence
3. Given a quality_test_results insert with result='conditional', then it succeeds; with result='partial' it fails the CHECK constraint

pipeline_inputs.description: Create quality_inspections + quality_test_results tables with sequences, CHECK enums, indexes, RLS, Drizzle schemas.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0120 emits both tables per §6.3 verbatim including SEQUENCE, GENERATED inspection_number, retention_until 7y, all CHECK enums (inspection_type 5 values, reference_type 5 values, status 6 values, result 4 values, priority 4 values). Child quality_test_results has parameter FK and result enum. RLS tenant_isolation on both.

test_strategy: RED: write packages/db/__tests__/quality-inspections-schema.test.ts asserting columns, GENERATED inspection_number format, CHECK enum rejection, RLS
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test quality-inspections-schema'
risk_red_lines: Do not omit retention_until GENERATED 7y (BRCGS Issue 10)
